source.name: Shopify Polaris
source.license_notes: Use source links and summarized guidance only; do not copy full documentation verbatim.

layout_rules: Wrap related inputs in a form and use standard form layout spacing.
Keep one true submit action at the end of the form.
Use help text when it changes user confidence or prevents mistakes.
accessibility_notes: Use the native form element behavior where possible.
Make keyboard submit behavior intentional; disable implicit submit only when it conflicts with the workflow.
implementation_hints: Use for commerce/admin settings where predictable form behavior matters.
Do not scatter submit buttons; keep the main submit action clear and late in the flow.

retrieval.ai_summary: Use Polaris form patterns for merchant/admin settings: native form semantics, standard spacing, clear help text, one submit action, and intentional keyboard submit behavior.
